title: Merck Company Overview
text: Merck & Co., Inc., known as MSD outside the United States and Canada, is a global healthcare company focused on prescription medicines, biologic therapies, vaccines, and animal health products. The company operates through two main segments: Pharmaceutical and Animal Health. The Pharmaceutical segment includes human prescription medicines and vaccines used in areas such as oncology, vaccines, infectious diseases, cardiometabolic and respiratory diseases, immunology, neuroscience, and ophthalmology. Key products include KEYTRUDA, GARDASIL, WINREVAIR, CAPVAXIVE, JANUVIA/JANUMET, BRIDION, Lynparza, and other medicines. The Animal Health segment develops veterinary pharmaceuticals, vaccines, and health management solutions for livestock and companion animals. For investment analysis, Merck is important because it has a major oncology franchise led by KEYTRUDA, a vaccine business, a growing animal health business, and a pipeline strategy aimed at reducing reliance on older products and preparing for future patent and competitive pressures.
